sglang.title: [model-gateway] convert workflow system to type-safe workflow data
sglang.author: slin1237
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Replace dynamic dyn Any context with typed, serializable workflow data to enable compile-time type safety and state persistence.
Key changes:
Core workflow module (src/workflow/)

Add WorkflowData trait with Serialize + DeserializeOwned + Send + Sync + Clone + 'static bounds
Make WorkflowEngine<D, S

sglang.title: [model-gateway] refactor workflow engine from type erasure to typed engines
sglang.author: slin1237
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Replace single WorkflowEngine with WorkflowEngines struct containing typed engines for each workflow type:

LocalWorkerEngine for local worker registration
ExternalWorkerEngine for external worker registration
WorkerRemovalEngine for worker removal
WorkerUpdateEngine for worker updates
McpEngine for

vllm.title: [ROCm][CI] Handle pytest status code 5 when a shard isn't allocated any tests
vllm.author: divakar-amd
vllm.bodyExcerpt: This PR ensures that test shards exiting with status 5 (indicating "no tests collected") are handled gracefully for AMD CI. vllm.title: [ROCm][Bugfix] Fix Mamba batched decode producing incorrect output
vllm.author: AndreasKaratzas
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Fixes Mamba-based models (Jamba, Mamba, FalconMamba, PLaMo2, etc.) producing garbage/incorrect output when multiple sequences are decoded together in a batch on ROCm. Single-sequence inference works correctly.
Problem
When running Mamba-based models on ROCm with batch size > 1, sequences produce inc

vllm.title: [ROCm][CI] Fix HuggingFace flash_attention_2 accuracy issue in Isaac vision encoder
vllm.author: AndreasKaratzas
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Fixes Isaac model test failures on ROCm by forcing SDPA (Scaled Dot-Product Attention) for the vision encoder. HuggingFace's flash_attention_2 implementation produces incorrect results on ROCm, causing vision embeddings to diverge significantly from CUDA.
Problem
Isaac model tests were failing on RO

vllm.title: [ROCm][CI] Fix engine core client tests for ROCm spawn multiprocessing
vllm.author: AndreasKaratzas
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Follow-up from: #32049. Fixes test_engine_core_client.py utility method tests failing on ROCm.
Problem
ROCm requires spawn as the multiprocessing start method (NVIDIA uses fork). With spawn, child processes start a fresh Python interpreter and re-import all modules, which means monkey-patches applie
